Here is a paragraph on Ajuga reptans:

Ajuga reptans, also known as Bugle, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Bioactive constituents of Ajuga reptans include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Ajuga reptans is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion to treat various health conditions.
